```js title=main.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./index.js": (function (__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require("./source/index.js");

console.log("something");


}),
"./source/index.js": (function (module) {
class Response {
	/**
	 * @param {CompiledMode} mode
	 */
	constructor(mode) {
		// eslint-disable-next-line no-undefined
		if (mode.data === undefined) mode.data = {};

		this.data = mode.data;
		this.isMatchIgnored = false;
	}

	ignoreMatch() {
		this.isMatchIgnored = true;
	}
}
function test() {
	let res = new Response();
	return res;
}
const result = test();

module.exports = result;


}),

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
